meta.title: ANNOUNCEMENT! I have a new podcast!!! #Spacewalkpodcast
meta.description:
https://www.youtube.com/@SpacewalkPodcast

I have a new podcast! You've been asking for some more casual uploads and to hear my thoughts on more things in general, so I started a new show, Spacewalk!

Spacewalk is my latest adventure where I take listener and supporter questions, having casual chats about whatever might be the current hot topic, while on an actual walk.  Join me as I continues my quest to "bring space down to Earth for everyday people" by answering your questions one step at a time.

Use #spacewalkpodcast anytime you want to ask a question or if you have a good topic for a show! And if you're a supporter on Patreon, YouTube or X, be sure and answer there too!

You can find Spacewalk anywhere you listen to podcasts and here on YouTube with the new Spacewalk Podcast Channel - https://www.youtube.com/@SpacewalkPodcast

Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/show/1aqImRngXHiGNroyzjmbFV?si=b0a4ba906fd04509

Apple Podcasts - https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/spacewalk-with-everyday-astronaut/id1736841796

RSS Feed - https://feeds.simplecast.com/kRpHBue5

#spacewalkpodcast

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music
